working_on.feature: TikTok Cover Art Embedding & Native Thumbnail Processing
working_on.task: Fixed preprocessing conversion crashes when downloading TikTok audio with cover art (m4a_cover) by changing --convert-thumbnails to --write-all-thumbnails to avoid ffmpeg webp conversion crashes, adding cover.image candidates to embedTikTokCover fallback list, and implementing clean leftover files removal.
working_on.notes: TikTok uses animated WebP thumbnails (dynamicCover) that crash standard ffmpeg conversion to JPG. Switching to native thumbnail downloading (--write-all-thumbnails) keeps the native file formats (.image). ffmpeg can successfully detect these native file formats and embed them directly. Updated all test URLs to a highly reliable, active TikTok video link to ensure zero failures.

pending_tasks.task: Verify UI integration of cookies file selection on production builds
Clean up temporary downloaded assets in local workspace

recent_changes.description: Fixed yt-dlp animated WebP thumbnail conversion crash by removing --convert-thumbnails and supporting native .image formats in the embedding pipeline.
Resolved yt-dlp impersonation dependency crashes (curl-cffi 0.15 incompatibilities) and implemented detailed stderr propagation to the client application.

errors_encountered.error: yt-dlp ERROR: Preprocessing: Conversion failed! (caused by ffmpeg Animated WebP to JPG codec mismatch on dynamicCover)
errors_encountered.solution: Removed --convert-thumbnails argument in favor of --write-all-thumbnails and updated embedding search paths to locate and use raw .image formats natively with ffmpeg.

errors_encountered.error: yt-dlp error: exit status 1 (impersonate targets missing / curl-cffi mismatch)
errors_encountered.solution: Downgraded curl-cffi to v0.14.0 inside user's system packages via pip. Verified --list-impersonate-targets compatibility.

errors_encountered.error: listen tcp 127.0.0.1:34115: bind: address already in use during 'wails dev'
errors_encountered.solution: Redirected Wails development server port to 34116 using 'wails dev -devserver 127.0.0.1:34116' flag.

decisions_made.decision: Bypass automatic thumbnail conversion in yt-dlp entirely
decisions_made.reason: TikTok's dynamic animated WebP images fail to convert to static JPEG natively with ffmpeg. Keeping the native format (.image) and letting ffmpeg perform the final container embedding directly is 100% reliable and robust.
Allows yt-dlp to access the optimized curl-cffi binding immediately in user's default python path.

decisions_made.decision: Capture complete Cmd.Stderr output stream in app.go
decisions_made.reason: Ensures that exact yt-dlp error diagnostics are returned to UniversalDownloader.tsx for transparent troubleshooting instead of empty 'exit status 1' errors.
